Subject: Forrester Research's Online Energy Trading, free analyst breakfast,
Message:
Hello,

Below is invite to Forrester Research's complimentary May 2nd energy
breakfast.  Limited availability.  Please share with anyone else in your
organization interested in attending.

You can sign-up via the link below.  When signing up, hit continue if the
screen asks for a "reservation code".   My contact information is below if
you have any questions.


Online wholesale trade will reach $3.6 trillion in 2005 -- dominated by
financial derivatives. Today's search for trading liquidity will
restructure the industry into three markets: liquidity hubs, merchant
platforms, and solution sites.

Jim Walker, senior analyst at Forrester Research, will discuss this
topic in detail at "New Directions For Online Energy Trading," a
complimentary Executive Breakfast. The Event will be held at the St.
Regis Hotel in Houston on May 2, 2001. This valuable session will focus
on these questions:

* What will energy trading look like in four years?
* What will drive trading growth in online exchanges?
* What role will energy merchants play in the new markets?

Seats are limited.
